specification.title: User Experience Framework and User Profile Definitions
specification.description: Create comprehensive user experience framework defining 7 user profiles (Casual, Super Fan, Traditional, Average, Niche, Gamer-non-CS/Val, Gamer-CS/Val-player). Define 3-step check for each profile (First Impressions, Experience Grounding, Post Use). Include decision value metrics and comparison to competitor UX.
requirements: Create 3-step check framework for each profile
Unify naming conventions across user journeys
acceptanceCriteria: User profile definitions (7 profiles, 1000+ words each)
3-step check framework (First Impressions, Experience Grounding, Post Use)

constraints.resources: UX research access, competitor site analysis

history.comment: Task created for UX framework per owner request
